transcript: [R] ”Upchuck”? What you talkin’—? I—I—I’ve never heard of it.
[R] I don’t have any upchuck, I don’t have any saliva, I don’t have any bile.
[L] I don’t know where you get that at.
[R] We just have regular, like, muscle cuts. We don’t sell any sort of liquids or anything like that.
[L] I don’t carry any o’ that oddball stuff like ‘at.
[R] Sir, we can’t get any urine or semen.
[L] We don’t have any bile, saliva, upchuck, blood. None of that.
[R] S—sir, we can not get any urine, blood, or semen.
[L] No, we—we don’t sell regurgitation, we don’t sell bile, we don’t sell semen, we don’t sell urine.
[R] Sir, we can’t get a drop of semen, we can’t get you a whole gallon, we can’t get you any.
[L] “Upchuck”? I don’t know what that is, man.
[R] I like it. I like it! Who is this?
[L] Okay. Is this a joke or something?
[R] Yeah… Youse have the wrong number!
[R] What kinda urine you tryin’ to get?
[R] Lips? No, we don’t lips, either.
[L] Okay. I was thinking it was something from the chuck section of the cow. [laughs]
[R] No, no buttocks, either. I do sell pork butts.
[R] [laughing] I don’t think I can help you with that! [laughs]
[R] Who wants some urine over the phone? Who the fuck orders this stuff?
[R] We just simply get muscle cuts.
[R] That’s like the pork chops, right?
[L] We don’t sell regurgitation, we don’t sell bile…
[R] It sounds like you’re underwater, actually.
[L] We’re only havin’ the blood and the stuff. You said you want the semen, the urine?
[R] Urine? That’s pee, bro. [unclear, perhaps, “Go over there and pee”]
